notes: No live src/ requirement tags are present for this slice.
The helper-layer tests and requirement-home files now show the 16 implemented clauses and the 9 partial clauses with existing test files; S3-0003 remains partial without a populated test file.
The helper-layer stream state lives in QuicConnectionStreamState and supporting snapshot/state enum types.
Requirement-home tests cover the implemented subset; the remaining partial and blocked clauses stay explicit.

requirements.title: Choose the correct state machine for unidirectional streams
requirements.notes: Local unidirectional streams are created send-only and do not expose a receive part.

requirements.title: Use both state machines for bidirectional streams
requirements.notes: Local bidirectional streams are created with both send and receive parts.

requirements.title: Allow alternate stream state machines with consistent behavior
requirements.remaining_gap: Design-level MAY clause; the current repo shape does not cleanly prove alternate stream-state representations.
requirements.notes: Design-level MAY clause; the current repo shape does not cleanly prove alternate stream-state representations.

requirements.title: Treat Ready as a newly created sendable stream
requirements.notes: Ready is the initial sendable state for newly created local streams.

requirements.title: Permit buffering in Ready
requirements.notes: The helper layer buffers outbound data in Ready and preserves ordered fragments through Send and DataSent transitions.

requirements.title: Enter Send state on first outbound stream frame
requirements.remaining_gap: Needs a direct edge proof for entering Send on the first outbound frame.
requirements.notes: Needs a direct edge proof for entering Send on the first outbound frame.

summary_notes: The helper-layer slice now closes 17 requirements, keeps 9 partially implemented, and leaves 40 blocked.
The remaining open requirements are explicit and grouped by section in the closeout artifact.
The repository still does not have the application-facing stream abstraction or STOP_SENDING/RESET orchestration needed to finish the chunk cleanly.
